title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at Licious

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at Licious
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Licious! We are hiring a Category Manager for our Madurai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Licious:
Licious is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Licious!
